name: runtime-degradation-guidance
description: Degraded runtime containment must stay visible in status and doctor output with concrete operator guidance.

expected.status_reason: Reason: proxy-shaped enforcement: direct non-proxy sockets remain outside the exact-destination boundary on macOS
expected.status_impact: Impact: direct non-proxy sockets remain outside the exact-destination boundary on this platform
expected.status_fix: Fix: prefer Linux exact-destination containment for the strongest below-hook boundary
expected.doctor_fix: Fix: relaunch from a minimal env, for example: env -u SSH_AUTH_SOCK sir run claude
